General.Name: Slam Corp.
General.Description: Slam Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or related business combination with one or more businesses or entities. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in New York, New York. Slam Corp. operates as a subsidiary of Slam Sponsor, LLC.
General.Address: 55 Hudson Yards, New York, NY, United States, 10001
